summary: Comprehensive testing completed for meal planner app. All 4 reported bugs verified as fixed. Backend APIs 100% passing (14/14 tests). Frontend flows 100% passing (8/8 critical flows tested).

issues: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' - non-blocking deprecation warning

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend: All endpoints properly secured with Firebase auth
✓ Backend: MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded from responses
✓ Frontend: All interactive elements have testID attributes
✓ Frontend: Proper error handling with visible error banners
✓ Frontend: AuthContext redirect logic working correctly with useSegments
✓ Frontend: API calls use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from env
✓ Frontend: Loading states implemented for async operations
seed_data_creation: Test data created: test@mealplanner.com account, 1 recipe (Chicken Tikka), 1 grocery item (Rice), 3 meal plan entries (TEST_Oatmeal, Pasta Salad, Chicken Tikka)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 user-reported bugs verified as fixed: 1) Sign out now redirects correctly to login page via AuthContext useSegments logic. 2) Recipe save working with visible success banner and navigation back to list. 3) Manual meal name entry working in planner with text input field. 4) Grocery item add working with loading states and immediate list update. Firebase auth integration working correctly. MongoDB persistence verified for all CRUD operations.

bugs_tested_and_verified_fixed.verification: Tested logout button click, verified redirect to login page after sign out. AuthContext now uses useSegments to detect route changes and redirect appropriately.
bugs_tested_and_verified_fixed.test_evidence: Screenshot: /tmp/after_logout_success.png shows login page after logout

bugs_tested_and_verified_fixed.verification: Created recipe with URL, title, tags, ingredients. Recipe saved successfully with visible 'Recipe saved!' success banner. Recipe appears in list after save. Backend API returns 200 with recipe data.
bugs_tested_and_verified_fixed.test_evidence: Backend test: test_create_and_get_recipe passed. Frontend: Recipe 'Chicken Tikka' visible in list with 'indian' tag and 'chicken' ingredient

bugs_tested_and_verified_fixed.bug: Can't manually type meal names in planner
bugs_tested_and_verified_fixed.verification: Clicked empty meal slot, clicked 'Type a meal name manually' toggle, filled text input with 'Pasta Salad', clicked Add button. Meal saved and appears in slot with 'Manual entry' label.
bugs_tested_and_verified_fixed.test_evidence: Screenshot: /tmp/planner_pasta_salad.png shows 'Pasta Salad' in lunch slot with 'Manual entry' label

bugs_tested_and_verified_fixed.verification: Filled grocery item input with 'Rice', quantity '2 kg', clicked + button. Item appears immediately in list. Toggle checkbox works with strikethrough. Backend API POST /api/grocery-lists/{week}/items returns 200.
bugs_tested_and_verified_fixed.test_evidence: Backend test: test_add_toggle_delete_grocery_item passed. Frontend: Screenshot shows 'Rice 2 kg' in list with checkbox toggle working

additional_flows_tested.details: Firebase auth working, token generated, redirect to recipes tab

additional_flows_tested.flow: Add recipe from social media URL
additional_flows_tested.details: YouTube URL detected, recipe saved with tags and ingredients

additional_flows_tested.flow: Assign saved recipe to meal slot
additional_flows_tested.details: Recipe picker modal opens, recipe selected, assigned to dinner slot
Next/prev week buttons working, meal plan loads for different weeks
Next/prev week buttons working, grocery list loads for different weeks
